titles.title: Lord You Are Everything To Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, without You, I couldn't face each morning And without You I couldn't sleep in peace each night Lord, without You, I couldn't go another moment There's no use going on Without You by my side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause Lord You are everything to me Yes, Lord, You are everything to me I love You more than anything 'Cause You are everything to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a desert in need of water Like a sailor who longs for the sea Like a story in need of an author Lord I, I need You always with me.
